title: microsorum phyllomanes
intro: Microsorum phyllomanes, also known as Java fern or Phyllomanes, is a type of aquatic plant native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Microsorum phyllomanes include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
